summary: Verified all 6 requested features via code review and UI testing: 1) Truck Profile '0' bug fix with proper isNaN checks, 2) New truck/trailer number and license plate fields in TruckProfileModal, 3) Driver license plate field in DriverProfileModal, 4) Route comparison smart tags (Fastest/Slowest/Cheapest/Most Expensive/Shortest/No Tolls), 5) POI panel nearest exit display, 6) Road labels and direction badges removed from route overlay.

minor.issue: API key reported as leaked (403 error) - TTS falls back to native browser speech synthesis. Non-blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: App.tsx line 279-288 - '0' bug fix ensures stored values of 0 for height/weight/length/width/axleCount/axleWeight use RECOMMENDED defaults via || operator
VERIFIED: App.tsx line 288 - trailerCount special handling: stored.trailerCount != null && stored.trailerCount > 0 ? stored.trailerCount : 1
VERIFIED: TruckProfileModal.tsx lines 72-81 - parseNum and parseInt2 use isNaN checks instead of falsy || checks
VERIFIED: TruckProfileModal.tsx lines 157-175 - New fields: truck-number, trailer-number, truck-plate, trailer-plate with data-testid attributes
VERIFIED: DriverProfileModal.tsx lines 149-162 - New licensePlate field with data-testid='driver-license-plate'
VERIFIED: SettingsView.tsx lines 437-460 - New ProfileField entries for Truck #, Trailer #, Truck Plate, Trailer Plate
VERIFIED: SettingsView.tsx line 576 - License Plate ProfileField in Driver Profile section
VERIFIED: RouteComparisonPanel.tsx lines 32-72 - computeRouteTags function returns tags: Fastest (green), Slowest (orange), Cheapest (gold), Most Expensive (red), Shortest (blue), No Tolls (purple)
VERIFIED: RouteComparisonPanel.tsx lines 176-179 - Time diff (+Xh Xm) and cost diff (+$X.XX) displayed for each route
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 5489-5497 - enrichedPois computation attaches nearestExit to each non-exit POI
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx lines 6311-6314 - POI panel items show 'Exit {number}' in green text when nearestExit data exists
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 4468 - placeRoadLabels call removed with comment 'Road name labels removed — user reported they cause confusion and screen clutter'
VERIFIED: useSignPlacement.ts lines 159-160 - directionBadge and directionLabel set to empty strings with comment 'Direction badges removed — user reported screen clutter'
VERIFIED: types.ts lines 161-164 and 180-183 - TruckProfile type extended with truckNumber, trailerNumber, truckPlate, trailerPlate

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 6 features verified via code review and UI testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 requested features verified: 1) '0' bug fix in App.tsx ensures numeric fields use defaults when stored as 0, 2) TruckProfileModal has 4 new fields (Truck #, Trailer #, Truck Plate, Trailer Plate) with proper data-testid attributes, 3) DriverProfileModal has new licensePlate field, 4) RouteComparisonPanel shows smart tags (Fastest/Slowest/Cheapest/Most Expensive/Shortest/No Tolls) with time/cost diffs, 5) POI panel shows nearest exit info in green text, 6) Road labels and direction badges removed from route overlay. Guest login works. Route comparison panel shows correctly with 3 route options.

truck_profile_0_bug_fix.details: App.tsx line 279-288 uses || operator for numeric fields and special handling for trailerCount. TruckProfileModal parseNum/parseInt2 use isNaN checks.

truck_profile_new_fields.details: TruckProfileModal has truck-number, trailer-number, truck-plate, trailer-plate inputs with data-testid attributes. SettingsView shows all 4 new ProfileField entries.

driver_profile_license_plate.details: DriverProfileModal has driver-license-plate input. SettingsView shows License Plate ProfileField in Driver Profile section.

route_comparison_smart_tags.details: RouteComparisonPanel computeRouteTags returns Fastest (green), Slowest (orange), Cheapest (gold), Most Expensive (red), Shortest (blue), No Tolls (purple). UI shows tags correctly with time/cost diffs.

poi_panel_nearest_exit.details: NavigationView enrichedPois computation attaches nearestExit to POIs. POI panel shows 'Exit {number}' in green text.

road_labels_removed.details: NavigationView placeRoadLabels call removed. useSignPlacement directionBadge and directionLabel set to empty strings.

guest_login.details: Guest login works. App loads to COMMAND CENTER dashboard, then Navigation view with map.

route_calculation.details: Route calculation works. Route comparison panel shows with 3 route options (PRIMARY, ALT 1, ALT 2) with smart tags, time, distance, fuel, and cost estimates.

known_issues.gemini_api_key: Gemini API key reported as leaked (403 error) - TTS falls back to native browser speech synthesis

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all integrations are live
